Patterns.Pattern: Outcome tracker with prediction accuracy works

WordPress plugin activation flow: server-to-server callback requires api_key + state nonce auth instead of user session. state is one-time use, hash_equals for timing safety. callback_url must be validated against site_url to prevent open-redirect.
